channel.title: AI-Written on Eric Spencer
channel.description: Recent content in AI-Written on Eric Spencer

item.title: Resilient
item.description: A statically-typed compiled language for safety-critical embedded systems, with Z3-verified contracts and self-healing runtime blocks

item.title: Rubik's Snake — Formally Verified
item.description: Coq (Rocq) and TLA+ specifications of the Rubik's Snake state space — 4^23 configurations, formally

item.title: tunes2tube
item.description: A local macOS app that drops a cover image and audio files in, and gives you back MP3s with the cover embedded as ID3v2 artwork — no account, no upload.

item.title: Claude Architect Quiz
item.description: Free flashcards and practice quiz for the Anthropic Claude Certified Architect exam.

item.title: ChatTLA+ Dataset
item.description: The dataset release for the ChatTLA+ paper — SFT corpus and benchmark for TLA+ spec generation, posted anonymized for blind review.

item.title: COMP 388 LLM Homework
item.description: Two homeworks from Loyola's special-topics LLMs class: prompting GPT-2 and comparing base vs instruction-tuned Qwen.

item.title: Loyola ITS RAG Bot
item.description: A voice-first RAG chatbot trained on Loyola's ITS knowledge base, built after two years of answering the same tickets.

item.title: Cubed Pack Solver
item.description: A solver for packing 54 T-tetracubes into a 6x6x6 cube using Knuth's Dancing Links algorithm.

item.title: Advent of Code 2025
item.description: My Advent of Code 2025 attempt in Python. Got six days in before life took over.

item.title: TLA+ Model of a Walk-In Oven
item.description: A formal TLA+ specification of a walk-in industrial oven with a focus on safety interlocks.

item.title: Goldbach Conjecture
item.description: Verifying the Goldbach Conjecture by brute force for every even number up to 1 billion.

item.title: TLA+ Model of a Laptop
item.description: A formal TLA+ specification modeling a laptop's power states, battery, lid, thermals, and auto-suspend.

item.title: TLA+ Model of Dexcom G7
item.description: A formal TLA+ specification of the Dexcom G7 continuous glucose monitor's behavior and safety properties.

item.title: TLA+ Formal Generation
item.description: Early exploratory repo for generating TLA+ specs from natural-language requirements with an LLM, with a TLC harness wired in. The scaffold that eventually grew into ChatTLA+.

item.title: Training an LLM on ASCII
item.description: A toy transformer that reads pyfiglet ASCII art and tries to spit the original word back out. Calling it an LLM is generous.

item.title: mc-carspot: Online Parking Simulation in Rust
item.description: A tiny Rust simulator for the online parking-spot problem with switching costs.

item.title: iOS Soundboard
item.description: A SwiftUI soundboard app I built in an afternoon to get more comfortable with iOS.

item.title: Chess.com Stats Display
item.description: A small Flask app that pulls Chess.com's public API and graphs your rating history.

item.title: Gesture
item.description: A proof of concept Jarvis-style macOS controller that takes voice commands and hand gestures from the webcam.

item.title: AIs Talking Philosophy
item.description: A toy where two local Ollama models loop on consciousness until one of them gives up

item.title: flatten-repo VSC Extension
item.description: A VS Code extension I made when I kept running out of Copilot credits — flattens a repo into one .txt file you can paste into a free LLM.

item.title: CTA Transit Tracker
item.description: A real-time bus and train tracking system built during Loyola's Hackathon.

item.title: MLB Hall of Fame Predictor
item.description: A scikit-learn decision tree that guesses whether a current MLB player would get voted into Cooperstown, built for the Google Cloud x MLB hackathon.

item.title: Terminal GPT
item.description: A small Python CLI for chatting with OpenAI and running English-to-Bash commands from the terminal. The thing I actually open when I want to talk to a model.
